visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a split-screen layout. On the left, a bearded man eats a large green leaf, and on the right, a young woman with black hair in pigtails and a blue tracksuit jacket points at the screen. (2) The scene transitions to the woman holding a clear plastic container filled with green, succulent-like vegetables called ice plants. She picks one up, showing the tiny, glistening, water-filled cells on the surface that look like frost or ice crystals. (3) She brings a bunch of the ice plant to her mouth and takes a large bite. Her facial expression shows genuine surprise with wide eyes and raised eyebrows as she chews. (4) A close-up shot focuses on the detailed texture of the ice plant's stem and leaves, emphasizing the 'frozen' appearance of the plant's surface. (5) The woman is shown holding a large metal bowl overflowing with the green ice plants. She continues to eat them one by one, looking directly at the camera with an impressed expression. (6) She opens a small white container of yogurt or dip. She dips a piece of the ice plant into the white substance and eats it, nodding her head in approval and smiling to indicate it tastes good. (7) The video concludes with her holding the bowl and talking to the camera, still dressed in her blue tracksuit in an indoor room with colorful decorations on the wall behind her.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens in a brightly lit, modern airport terminal. The background shows blurred travelers, airport signage, and overhead lighting typical of an international transport hub. (2) The scene shifts to an indoor restaurant setting with warm lighting. The woman is seen sitting at a wooden table, wearing a dark pink jacket. Before her is a large stainless steel bowl filled with thick, creamy beige soy milk noodles. Close-up shots follow, showing the texture of the noodles being lifted by chopsticks and the woman taking large bites with an appreciative expression. (3) The character is then shown standing outside a retail store with a large red 'Daiso' logo in both English and Korean. She is now wearing a pink knit cardigan and carrying a light blue quilted bag with a ruffled strap. The scene transitions inside the store, showing rows of brightly colored skincare and beauty products on white shelves. Hands are shown scanning items at a self-checkout kiosk. (4) The setting moves outdoors to a street lined with cherry blossom trees in full bloom under clear blue sky. The woman stands under the trees, blowing cherry blossom petals toward the camera. She wears the same pink cardigan and light blue bag. The lighting is natural and bright, highlighting the soft pink of the flowers. (5) The woman is shown indoors, likely in a hotel room or studio, holding various small skincare packets purchased earlier. She demonstrates the features of her light blue quilted bag, pointing at the 'CARLYN' brand tag and showing the spacious interior by pulling items out. She gestures towards her shoulder to show different ways of wearing the bag. (6) The final phase takes place in a bustling Korean BBQ restaurant. The woman, back in her pink jacket, sits in front of a charcoal grill where thick cuts of marbled beef are sizzling. She uses silver chopsticks to eat the meat and small side dishes. The background features walls covered with signed celebrity photos, indicating a popular dining spot.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a high-energy female host standing on a busy urban street in Taiwan, wearing a black-and-white plaid shirt over a grey top and black pants. She is gesturing enthusiastically with both hands toward the camera while introducing the topic of hair washing habits. Behind her, scooters are parked along the sidewalk, and city traffic is visible in the background under bright daylight. (2) The scene transitions into a series of street interviews where the host interacts with several young women. Each woman is shown in a medium shot, often holding a small black microphone. The settings are consistent with a commercial district, featuring brick buildings and retail storefronts. Icons of a yellow sun and a blue moon appear on screen to visually represent 'morning' and 'night' choices. (3) The host and three interviewees are seen gathered together, focusing on a rectangular beige bottle of shampoo. One of the women holds a small silver bowl, and they are seen smelling the product with expressions of surprise and delight. The lighting is natural and bright, highlighting the textures of their hair and the product packaging. (4) The host moves to an indoor setting, appearing in a bedroom with a large white bed and a bathroom with white marble tiling. She demonstrates the shampoo's texture, showing thick white foam on her palms. She is seen washing her hair with the foam, smiling at the camera, and later showcasing the smooth, shiny results of her hair from a back-view perspective. (5) The final sequence shows the host back in the bedroom, holding two different product bottles—the shampoo and a matching conditioner. She speaks directly to the lens with a persuasive expression, gesturing towards the bottles. The room is softly lit with warm indoor lighting, creating a comfortable and domestic atmosphere.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a split-screen introduction. On the left, a woman with blonde hair in a maroon sweatshirt prepares green onions. On the right, the main character, a woman with dark hair wearing a white textured knit hat and a pink shirt, is eating. The setting is a brightly lit indoor room with colorful posters and a desk. (2) The main character holds up a large bundle of fresh green onions wrapped in plastic. She proceeds to cut the roots on a wooden cutting board and washes the stalks under a tap. (3) She opens several small square packages of Kiri cream cheese and places them into a clear glass bowl. She then squeezes a packet of honey over the cheese and stirs the mixture vigorously with a fork until it reaches a smooth, creamy consistency. (4) The woman takes a bag of Lay's chips and crushes them by hand while they are still in the bag. She then introduces a red package of dried meat paper, cutting the thin sheets into small pieces with scissors into a tray containing the crushed chips. (5) Using a small spoon, she thickens the white stem of a green onion with the prepared cream cheese. She then rolls and dips the coated onion into the mixture of crushed chips and meat paper until it is fully covered. (6) She takes a large, crunchy bite of the onion. Initially, she smiles and gives a thumbs up, but as she continues chewing, her expression shifts to one of surprise and discomfort from the onion's pungency, fanning her mouth and reacting to the heat.

By listing contrasting opinions on food, animals, and lifestyle habits, it encourages viewers to engage by tagging their own friends with opposite tastes.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator is prominently eating a specific branded snack (Binggrae Jerky Jerky) throughout the second half of the video, and the packaging is clearly visible.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The chemistry between the two subjects is the central appeal. The fast-paced editing and variety-show style overlays make it highly suitable for social media short-form platforms.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white cardigan and a red top, holds a blue passport and an airline ticket while walking through a bright, modern airport hallway. She smiles broadly and talks directly to the camera in a selfie perspective. The scene cuts to a close-up of the ticket and then to a meal tray on an airplane containing meat, fries, and a salad. (2) Back at the airport, she is greeted by a man in a professional white shirt and tie holding a sign with a red 'N' logo. She gets into the back of a luxury black Mercedes van with leather seats. The lighting is natural and bright. (3) The van arrives at the 'Fairmont Ambassador Seoul' hotel. Inside the lobby, she encounters staff dressed in pink jumpsuits and black masks with geometric shapes, mimicking the 'Squid Game' characters. She poses for a selfie with one of them, looking excited. (4) She receives a gift card and a Tiffany & Co. bag. She enters her hotel room, which features two large beds covered in 'Squid Game' themed merchandise, including snacks, a green tracksuit, and a personalized letter. She shows a box of chocolates and a snack pack to the camera. (5) After a costume change into a floral dress, she walks through a crowded, high-end hotel lobby. She visits 'Dahlia Dining,' a restaurant by Chef Choi Hyun-seok. Multiple dishes are shown, including grilled skewers, creamy soup with scallops, and mapo tofu. A coaster with the Netflix logo is visible. (6) She stands in a luxurious bathroom with marble walls and warm lighting, addressing the camera with energetic hand gestures. B-roll of her eating and reacting to the food is interspersed with her talking head segments.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: NETFLIX. [Slogan]: 招待我回家 24小時能花多少?. [Variety]: (韓星採訪者). [Subtitle]: Netflix叫我回韓國. (2) [Slogan]: 飛機票 $14,000NT. [Subtitle]: 立馬看看飛機餐. 順便說, 我的新護照很好看吧. (3) [Subtitle]: 一到韓國. 有禮車司機來接我耶!. [Slogan]: 私人接送 $800NT. [Subtitle]: 第一次搭禮車!!!. (4) [Subtitle]: 到了5星級飯店. [Slogan]: 5星級飯店 $10,700NT/晚. [Logo]: Fairmont AMBASSADOR SEOUL. (5) [Subtitle]: 蛤?...士兵?. [Variety]: (害羞). [Subtitle]: 你後面!!!. 歡迎光臨.... [Variety]: (有點怕怕). (6) [Subtitle]: 整間五星級飯店直接打造成《魷魚遊戲》, 好扯. 從Lobby一直送禮物. [Slogan]: 周邊禮物 $3000NT. [Variety]: (有環自己預測?). (7) [Subtitle]: 甚至飯店還準備了親筆信跟巧克力送給我, 超貼心!. 但其實我只要來便利商店就已經超開心了. [Slogan]: 零食費 $??? NT. [Subtitle]: 零食費用, 讓大家猜猜看唷. (8) [Subtitle]: 換衣服後去吃晚餐!. 這裡是「黑白大廚」崔賢錫主廚的 Dahlia Dining. 是蔬食精緻料理餐廳. (9) [Subtitle]: 全素的料理竟然這麼好吃. 一道接一道的套餐根本吃不完, 我真的超飽的. [Slogan]: 黑白大廚晚餐 $4,000NT/桌. (10) [Subtitle]: 大家猜猜看我今天一整天下來總共花了Netflix多少錢?. 可以底下留言!!! **有抽獎**. 最接近正確答案的1位, 我會送你韓國化妝品. (11) [Subtitle]: 雖然這些都很高級又舒服而且是免費非常特別. 但能跟全球創作者們見面. 能聽到各種不同的故事. 對我來說也是收穫滿滿的一段時間!. (12) [Subtitle]: 如果好奇後續的主要活動的話請關注我的IG&YT. 總金額答案會在下一集公佈!!!.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman sits on the floor of a home interior, surrounded by numerous cardboard boxes and packages. (2) She picks up a black shopping bag branded with 'Threads,' removes a folded white shirt and several cards, and then places a small black-and-white party hat on her head. (5) She presents 'SLIGHT' brand skincare products, specifically a bottle of makeup remover oil and a green box of acne patches. (6) She holds up two gold and white jars of 'La Glow' neck cream that she pulled from a white delivery box. (7) She opens a small cardboard box from 'ATHE' and shows a small frosted green bottle of facial essence. (8) She struggles with her tight party hat while picking up a large pink 'dasique' bag, which she opens to reveal a large multi-colored lip and cheek palette. (10) She holds up two large bags of 'Da Wu Shan Ranch' snacks, opening the strawberry flavor and eating a piece of the crispy cake stick. (11) She displays a purple box of 'Paperbag' health supplements, opens a packet to show three dark tablets, and eats one. (17) The camera pans over the extremely messy floor covered in discarded boxes and packaging. The woman waves goodbye looking slightly overwhelmed before the video ends.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a selfie-style shot of a woman with long brownish hair, wearing a white t-shirt and a green tracksuit top numbered 456. She is standing on a wide city street at night, surrounded by other participants in similar green tracksuits. The lighting is bright from street lamps and neon signs of nearby skyscrapers. The woman and her companions are initially frozen in a 'Red Light, Green Light' pose, holding their phones up to record. (2) The scene transitions through quick cuts showing different aspects of the event. We see a group of three individuals dressed as 'guards' from the show, wearing hot pink hooded jumpsuits and black masks with white shapes like circles and triangles. Then, a group of four male participants in green tracksuits waves enthusiastically at the camera. The background shows an urban environment with modern office buildings and large digital billboards under a dark night sky. (3) The camera captures a giant animatronic doll, Young-hee, mounted on a tall platform in the center of the road, facing the participants. The participants, including the main woman, are seen running forward and then suddenly stopping. Crowds of onlookers are visible behind metal barriers on the sidewalks, some taking photos. The woman interacts with a male friend in a similar tracksuit; both are smiling and laughing as they navigate the game. (4) In the final phase, the main woman is seen running down the wide, multi-lane road, which has been closed to traffic for the parade. She looks directly into the camera while breathing heavily from exertion but smiling broadly. The male friend appears next to her, also celebrating their 'survival.' The background features the glowing logos of high-rise hotels and buildings like the Koreana Hotel against the dark sky.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A major multi-lane urban thoroughfare in Seoul (Sejong-daero area) lined with tall office buildings, hotels like the Koreana Hotel, and bright digital billboards. The street is cordoned off for a public parade event.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with the iconic and slightly eerie Korean vocal recording from 'Red Light, Green Light,' delivered in a high-pitched, child-like tone. This is immediately followed by a sharp, digital electronic beep signaling the 'stop' phase. The main female speaker enters with a high-energy, excited Mandarin greeting, her voice characterized by high pitch variability and a fast speech rate. (2) An upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music track fades in, providing a rhythmic and festive atmosphere. The sound of multiple people cheering and clapping creates a dense 'Crowd Noise' layer. The primary speaker's voice is layered over this, maintaining a joyful and professional narrative tone as she describes her experience. Occasional short laughter from a male voice is also audible. (3) As the game continues, the 'Red Light, Green Light' chant repeats intermittently. Between the chants, the music swells slightly. A male voice asks 'Who are you?' in Korean with a playful, rising intonation. The sound of footsteps on asphalt and the rustle of tracksuit fabric contribute to the incidental noise. The mix is clear, with a high signal-to-noise ratio despite the urban setting. (4) The video concludes with loud cheering, whistling, and a triumphant swell in the background music. The main speakers' voices become more breathless as they run, with noticeable vocal strain from excitement. The ambient noise of the city, such as distant traffic hum, is present but kept low in the mix compared to the foreground voices and music. Final enthusiastic greetings are exchanged as the scene fades.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Immersive Experience -> High-Energy Celebration
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This video is a high-energy travel vlog promoting a Netflix-sponsored 'Squid Game' parade event in the heart of Seoul. It captures the creator's immersive experience participating in a large-scale, real-life version of the 'Red Light, Green Light' game alongside other fans, using the excitement and the iconic visual cues of the show to entertain and engage viewers while documenting a unique cultural event.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly shows the NETFLIX logo, mentions 'Squid Game 3' VIP schedule, and features the core IP elements of the show (doll, costumes, guards).

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly dynamic social-media edit characterized by fast cuts and dense text overlays, effectively merging travel content with brand promotion.

She dips the okra in a small container of sauce, takes a large bite, and chews enthusiastically. She then picks up a fried dumpling from the cardboard box and eats it while making a thumbs-up gesture and nodding.

The background is a brightly lit indoor room with posters. (2) The woman is shown in a medium close-up, eating the cereal and water mixture from a blue patterned bowl with a metal spoon. After taking a bite, she makes a disgusted face, pulling her lips back and squinting her eyes while shaking her head 'no' vigorously. (3) The scene shifts to a handheld walking shot across a tiled grey floor. The woman, now wearing a grey hoodie over her blouse, enters a CoCo bubble tea shop and points at a digital menu showing various orange and yellow drinks. She holds up a plastic cup of pearl milk tea. (4) Back indoors, the woman pours a large cup of light brown milk tea into a giant clear glass bowl. She then adds several containers of toppings, including orange taro balls, black grass jelly, and the remaining cereal. The bowl becomes filled with a dense, colorful mixture of liquids and solids. (5) She takes a large spoonful of the final mixture and eats it. Her eyes widen and she smiles broadly, showing extreme satisfaction. She gives a thumbs up to the camera while holding the CoCo drink cup next to the bowl, which is now being stirred with a blue and white spoon.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long brown hair, wearing a pink oversized hoodie, stands indoors in front of a white paneled door. (2) The scene shifts to a medium full shot. The woman has changed her outfit to a white ribbed top and pink trousers. She is adjusting a light blue wearable plastic tray suspended from her shoulders by blue cords. She stands in a room with white walls and a visible umbrella leaning in the background. (3) The scene cuts to Ningxia Night Market in Taipei. The woman stands in the middle of a street lined with food stalls. She is wearing the blue tray, which now holds a bottle of blue-labeled water and some paper bags. People walk by in the background under a cloudy daylight sky. (4) In a series of rapid cuts, the woman is seen eating different foods at the market. Close-ups show her biting into a large stick of pig blood cake, using chopsticks to eat an oyster omelet from a box on her tray, and holding a fried chicken cutlet. (5) The weather changes to rainy; the woman is now holding a clear umbrella while continuing to eat sweet potato balls and fried milk. The lighting becomes more muted due to the overcast sky, but the market stalls' lights are visible. She holds the PH 9.0 water bottle and drinks from it. (6) The woman stands prominently in the frame, holding up the PH 9.0 bottle toward the camera. Large text overlays provide event information and promotional details. She smiles and waves at the camera while the background shows the evening bustle of the night market with glowing signs and moving crowds.

On the right side, a woman with long dark hair, wearing a gray scoop-neck t-shirt, is shown from the head and shoulders up, eating a bowl of pudding. On the left side, rapid visual cuts show hands demonstrating makeup techniques, applying spray and foundation to skin in a bright, indoor setting with flat white lighting. (2) The scene shifts to the woman in the center of the frame. She gestures expressively with her hands as she speaks directly to the camera. She holds a tall, white and clear spray bottle, presenting it as she explains a beauty method. The background is a clean, minimalist indoor room with soft shadows. (3) A close-up shot shows the woman applying the spray to her face, followed by her using her bare palms to rub liquid foundation into her cheeks and forehead. Her skin begins to exhibit a high-gloss, reflective texture. Yellow and white text captions appear frequently at the center and bottom of the frame. (4) The woman leans in closer to the camera to show the final result: a luminous, 'glass skin' effect. She touches her cheek with a finger and then shows the clean finger to the camera, demonstrating that the makeup does not transfer. Her expression is one of pleasant surprise and satisfaction. (5) The shot transitions to her holding a set of three skincare products: a spray, a serum, and a jar of cream. The packaging is consistent, featuring white caps and gray-speckled containers. She demonstrates the serum's twist-top mechanism, showing how the dropper emerges and retracts. (6) In the final phase, she applies the serum and cream in a specific sequence, showing the skin's texture becoming more hydrated and plump. Comparison shots of her skin over a two-week period are shown briefly, highlighting reduced redness and improved clarity. She concludes by holding the entire product line while smiling.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to review a series of Korean instant spicy rice cake products while simultaneously testing a viral social media trend of mixing ice cream with spicy tteokbokki. visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long black hair, dressed in a black and white striped crop top and light pink sweatpants, stands in a brightly lit indoor living room. She smiles warmly at the camera while holding a plastic-wrapped package of fresh green okra. (2) In a close-up shot, she places a spoonful of salt into a gold-toned pot of vigorously boiling water on a gas range. She then carefully drops the green okra pods into the bubbling water using metal tongs. (3) The scene shifts to a kitchen sink where the woman holds a metal strainer filled with boiled okra under a stream of cold running water. She then moves to a white countertop to trim the stems and slice the pods into bite-sized circular pieces. (4) She transfers the chopped okra into a tall, clear glass jar. She then adds several slices of hard-boiled eggs from a white plate and sprinkles seasonings and sauces, including a black packet of spicy tuna, into the container. (5) The woman tightly secures the white lid of the jar and shakes it vertically and horizontally with high energy. The contents are visibly tossed and coated in a reddish-orange spicy sauce as she moves the jar in front of her. (6) She opens the jar and uses a long spoon to scoop out a portion of the spicy salad, taking a large bite. Her facial expressions convey intense satisfaction as she chews, later using seaweed sheets to wrap more of the food and continuing to eat enthusiastically.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair and a black T-shirt presents two small blue boxes labeled 'LABUBU' in an indoor setting with wooden floors and neutral walls. She gestures excitedly, holding the boxes close to the camera lens to show the egg-themed packaging details. (2) She carefully unboxes a speckled, cream-colored egg, holding it up for a size comparison against her hand. She looks into the camera with a curious and slightly skeptical expression while tapping the hard surface of the object. (3) She places the egg into a large stainless steel bowl filled with water, which sits on a white table. The camera uses a medium close-up shot as the egg begins to float and she waves goodbye to the camera lens with a smile. (4) Transitioning to a different outfit including a grey cap and white shirt, she reacts with a facial expression of disgust as she shows the egg in the water starting to crack after four hours, revealing a blue interior. (5) Wearing transparent plastic gloves, she reaches into the water to retrieve a soggy, blue and white rabbit-shaped toy that has emerged from the shell after 24 hours. She holds it up, displaying its odd, spongy texture and distorted facial features. (6) She compares two different toys: one blue/white and one yellow/green. Both look misshapen and lumpy. She holds them close to the camera, squeezing them to demonstrate their soft, water-logged consistency and weird physical state. (7) In the final phase, she shows the toys after several days; they have expanded significantly but remain distorted. She holds both up to the camera with a pleading, humorous expression, gesturing for viewers to take them as the video ends.

The lighting is bright and diffused, creating a clean and soft atmosphere. (2) She picks up a single white rice cake with her right hand, which features light blue nail polish. She pulls the remaining piece apart with her fingers to display the porous, sponge-like internal texture, which appears soft and moist. visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a split-screen arrangement. On the top-left, a foreign woman with black hair in a bun and a floral top is shown eating colorful ribbon-shaped candies. On the right, the main Asian female creator with long brown hair and a white shirt watches the clip with a look of extreme curiosity and surprise while holding a green stick. (2) The scene shifts to the main creator sitting on a beige bed, wearing a vibrant pink cardigan. She is holding a small white Maltese dog on her lap. A silver laptop is visible in front of her. A digital screen overlay appears, displaying a Korean online shopping interface with various candy products and prices. (3) The creator holds two rectangular boxes of 'Ribbon Candy' in red and green colors toward the camera. She stands in a bright indoor room with neutral wall tones. She opens the green box to reveal the green and white striped candy packed in a transparent plastic container, showing her excited facial expression. (4) A close-up shot captures the green ribbon candy, which appears fractured and broken within its tray. The creator is shown in a small inset frame, covering her mouth with her hands in a state of shock. Large, colorful text overlays in Korean and Chinese appear on the screen to emphasize her speechless reaction. (5) The creator picks up a large piece of the green ribbon candy and attempts to bite it. Her face shows significant effort and strain as she tries to chew the hard texture. A graphic overlay of a Lotte Green Grape candy bag appears as she compares the flavors. The small white dog watches her closely from the side. (6) In the final phase, the creator tries the red, white, and green striped cherry-flavored candy. She continues her review, speaking directly to the lens with expressive gestures. She holds the candy packaging up one last time while explaining the price and size before the video ends in the same bright indoor setting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-tempo, bright BGM featuring a steady electronic drum beat. A foreign woman's voice says 'All right' and 'Awesome' amidst the sound of intense, resonant crunching SFX. The primary Asian female speaker lets out a sharp, high-pitched gasp of surprise in Korean. (2) A sharp transition whoosh leads into the main creator's fast-paced, enthusiastic narration. A single, high-pitched dog bark punctuates the background. The BGM maintains a consistent melodic loop with playful synth bells. The ambient noise floor is extremely low, highlighting the clarity of the voice. (3) Mechanical clicking sounds and paper rustling SFX occur as a box is opened. The creator's voice exhibits high arousal and excitement. The BGM remains energetic, and the speech-to-music ratio is well-balanced, ensuring the narration remains the primary focus of the mix. (4) A comic 'ding' SFX and a descending melodic stinger accentuate a moment of disappointment as the broken candy is discovered. The creator's vocal tone shifts to an exaggeratedly sad and uncertain pitch, with audible vocal tension. The sound design clearly highlights her emotional reaction. (5) Heavy, percussive biting and snapping SFX take center stage as the creator tries to chew the candy. These sounds are recorded with high spectral brightness, making the crunching feel very close to the listener. Her speech becomes slightly muffled and strained while she is chewing. (6) The video concludes with more loud crunching SFX and a final sequence of animated talking. The creator's speech rate remains high and the tone professional yet casual. The BGM fades out with a final electronic flourish, leaving a clean tail of indoor room tone.

(4) The woman holds a bag of 'Dried Strawberry' (草莓乾) against her face. She opens the bag to show a clear plastic tray filled with dark, shriveled red fruit pieces. visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a pink top and a large white hair bow, stands in a brightly lit indoor kitchen or dining area. She smiles broadly while holding two white paper cups filled with sliced green okra, presenting them to the camera with high energy. (2) The scene transitions as she begins preparing a meal, pouring cooked white rice into a large clear glass bowl on a table. She proceeds to crack two eggs into the bowl, followed by the contents of the okra cups, which have a visibly slimy and sticky texture. (3) She uses a blue and white patterned spoon to vigorously mix the ingredients. The mixture becomes increasingly gooey and stringy as she adds liquids from several bottles, including soy sauce, vinegar, and sesame oil, under bright, flat indoor lighting. (4) The woman begins eating the okra rice mixture directly from the large bowl. She takes large bites, her facial expressions showing intense enjoyment and satisfaction, often squinting her eyes and nodding while chewing. (5) She briefly leaves the frame and returns with a green package of seaweed. She wraps portions of the sticky mixture in seaweed sheets and eats them. She also adds a dark red sauce from a small bottle labeled with cartoon graphics. (6) She takes a long sip of a pale green liquid from a large glass mug using a black straw, then continues eating the remaining mixture with the same high level of enthusiasm until the end of the video.

She wears a thick, beige faux fur coat and has a look of exaggerated surprise on her face. Behind her, refrigerated shelves are filled with various pre-packaged meals and drinks. (2) Chronological montage of her shopping: a close-up shows her hand picking up a mochi cream puff from the shelf, followed by a Hokkaido milk roll cake, a small pudding cup, a can of Sapporo Classic beer, and a natto rice roll. (3) The scene transitions to a brightly lit indoor room, possibly a hotel. The woman, now in a grey zip-up hoodie, is seen from a medium close-up perspective. She holds the mochi cream puff, tears open the plastic wrapper with a crinkling sound, and shows the soft, white texture to the camera. (4) She takes a large bite of the puff, revealing a rich cream filling inside. Her facial expression is one of intense delight and shock at the taste. (5) She then shows a package of Glica Friend Bakery chocolate biscuits, takes one out, and eats it. (6) Next, she unwraps the natto rice roll, pulling the white rice cylinder out of its plastic sleeve to reveal the stringy natto beans inside. She eats it with visible enjoyment, smiling and nodding. (7) The video concludes with a close-up shot of the milk roll cake slices and a final shot of the Sapporo beer can held against a plain wall.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a medium close-up of a young woman with long, dark brown hair and thick bangs, looking into the camera with a smile. She is wearing a soft, mauve-colored knit sweater. Her makeup is prominent, featuring pink-toned eyeshadow, rosy blush, and a vibrant red lip tint. The background is a simple, brightly lit indoor space, possibly a room at home, with a neutral-colored wall and a glimpse of a textured shutter behind her. (2) The scene shifts to a tighter close-up of the woman's lips as she begins a makeup demonstration. She carefully applies a red liquid lip tint to her lips, pressing them together to distribute the color. Small animated sparks appear on screen around her lips to emphasize the visual effect. Her hands are steady as she manipulates the product, showing the transformation of her lip texture and color. (3) Further close-up shots show the woman using a black cushion puff to gently tap her lips, softening the edges of the color. She then uses a slim pink lip liner to define and slightly overline her lips for a fuller appearance. The lighting remains bright and focused on her lower face, highlighting the glossy finish and the precision of the application. (4) The woman holds up a white and metallic product tube from the brand ANNAEVERYDAY, pointing to the applicator. The scene cuts to a close-up of the product label which clearly states "Made in Japan". She then applies the clear lip oil directly onto her lips using a metallic ball applicator, which glides smoothly over her skin, creating a high-shine, plumped look. (5) A split-screen or "Before and After" comparison is shown, highlighting the difference in lip volume and glossiness. The "Before" side shows her natural lips with a pale pink tint, while the "After" side shows the fully finished, shiny, and defined "MulMul Lip". She continues to talk to the camera, gesturing with her hands and occasionally touching her face to draw attention to the makeup.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-pitched, energetic female voice speaking Traditional Chinese at a moderate tempo. Her tone is friendly and welcoming, suggesting a direct address to her audience. In the background, a light-hearted acoustic pop track plays, featuring a steady strumming acoustic guitar and a gentle piano melody. The beat is subtle, providing a rhythmic foundation without overpowering the speech. (2) As the narrator transitions into the instructional part of the video, her vocal delivery remains clear and well-enunciated. Each step is punctuated by a short, bright "ding" sound effect, signifying a new tip or action. The background music maintains its upbeat and consistent energy, perfectly synchronized with the visual pacing of the tutorial. (3) The speaker's volume increases slightly when highlighting specific benefits of the product, such as its hydrating properties and high-quality ingredients. A subtle "whoosh" sound effect is used during scene transitions, adding a professional production feel. The ambient noise is minimal, indicating a quiet, indoor recording environment that prioritizes vocal clarity. (4) In the final phase, the narrator's voice adopts a more persuasive and enthusiastic tone, emphasizing that the product does not require makeup remover. The music swells slightly in volume before fading out as the video ends. The overall audio quality is clean and studio-like, with a high signal-to-noise ratio that ensures the instructions are easily understood.

To her right, stylized 2D graphics of bacon and a basting brush appear mid-air against the white wall. (2) As the woman begins a rhythmic dance, more food graphics populate the frame around her: a charcoal grill, a cluster of sausages, a slice of bread, a green pomelo, and a jar of sauce. She smiles brightly, moving her hands in coordination with the beat. (3) The woman continues her choreography, performing a mix of waist-swaying and hand-pointing gestures. The camera remains static at eye-level, capturing her upper and middle body as she interacts playfully with the hovering digital food items. (4) She briefly turns her back to the camera, showcasing the back of her white jacket and brown shorts, while a large flame graphic appears over the grill, simulating the cooking process. (5) Turning back to face the camera, the individual ingredients are replaced by a large graphic of a finished meat sandwich. Two mooncakes on a plate and slices of pomelo also appear, symbolizing a Mid-Autumn Festival theme. She finishes with a confident pose and a wide smile.
